name: primary_key
description: Source-side stable per-row identifier. Passes through unchanged into silver/gold when present; M8 writeback synthesizes '<site_id>|<iso_utc_timestamp>' as a fallback when absent. Recommended REQUIRED in production source tables.

name: timestamp
description: Half-hour observation timestamp in UTC. miaproc.eddy.bigquery_runner uses this to build the BigQuery WHERE clause and ORDER BY; load_stage1 reuses it to build DateTime.

name: site_id
description: Site identifier (e.g. RBRL, RBMNN). Filtered server-side by miaproc via @site_id parameter (Decision 008 multi-site contract). Matched against --site-id passed to the CLI.

name: co2_flux
description: EddyPro CO2 flux. Renamed to NEE inside miaproc by FULL_OUTPUT_RENAME_MAP. Load-bearing for stage-1 cleaning, gap filling, and partitioning.

name: qc_co2_flux
description: EddyPro QC class for co2_flux (0-good / 1-medium / 2-bad). Renamed to QC_NEE; rows with value 2 are masked by apply_qc_flags before downstream processing.

name: air_temperature
description: EddyPro air temperature in K. Renamed to Tair and unit-converted to degrees C inside miaproc.eddy.qc.convert_units.

name: u_star
description: Friction velocity in m/s. Renamed to USTAR via the case-study u_star -> u. -> USTAR alias chain. Required for u* filtering (Decision 009 dynamic plateau estimator).

name: VPD
description: Vapor pressure deficit in hPa. Pass-through under the same name; consumed as a driver in MDS gap filling and Lasslop partitioning.

name: H
description: Sensible heat flux. Pass-through; consumed by the QC filter (qc_H) and 3-sigma filter alongside NEE and LE.

name: qc_H
description: EddyPro QC class for H. Used by apply_qc_flags to mask H rows where value equals 2.

name: LE
description: Latent heat flux. Pass-through; same QC + 3-sigma treatment as H.

name: filename
description: EddyPro source filename. Optional pass-through; preserved into silver/gold by the M14 column-preservation contract.

name: DOY
description: Day of year as recorded by EddyPro. Optional pass-through.
